ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "community" TEXT /* Neighborhood or community where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property's location */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the property's listing */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "sq_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenity_count" INTEGER /* Number of amenities available */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the property */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the property details were last updated */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "cats" INTEGER /* Allowance for cats */,
  "dogs" INTEGER /* Allowance for dogs */,
  "utility_heat" INTEGER /* Availability of heat utility */,
  "utility_electricity" INTEGER /* Availability of electricity utility */,
  "utility_water" INTEGER /* Availability of water utility */,
  "utility_cable" INTEGER /* Availability of cable utility */,
  "utility_internet" INTEGER /* Availability of internet utility */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "gym" INTEGER /* Availability of a gym */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Availability of a pool */,
  "balcony" INTEGER /* Availability of a balcony */,
  "patio" INTEGER /* Availability of a patio */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the property is wheelchair accessible */,
  "furnished" INTEGER /* Whether the property is furnished */,
  "air_conditioning" INTEGER /* Availability of air conditioning */,
  "heating" INTEGER /* Availability of heating */,
  "laundry" INTEGER /* Availability of laundry facilities */,
  "storage" INTEGER /* Availability of storage space */,
  "security_system" INTEGER /* Availability of a security system */,
  "high_speed_internet" INTEGER /* Availability of high-speed internet */,
  "cable_tv" INTEGER /* Availability of cable TV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property owner, property manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listed the property */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the property (e.g., Immediate, Apr 30) */,
  "available_month" INTEGER /* Month the property becomes available */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "listing_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the listing expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., Active, Expired, Pending) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the listing has been viewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the listing was last updated */,
  "lease_term" TEXT /* Lease term (e.g., 1 month, 1 year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the message is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the message has been read */,
  "reply_to_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being replied to (for threading) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
